programme.title: Bratz
programme.desc: A mysterious bow found laying on Jade's desk causes trouble left and right.

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Two Minion Pigs pretend to be sharks to scare their fellows. But Moustache Pig wants his revenge.

programme.title: Angry Birds
programme.desc: Chuck offers a gnome to Matilda as a present. Unfortunately it looks really scary to her and she tries to get rid of it without Chuck seeing.

programme.title: BATTLES
programme.desc: These unique fishing techniques are WILD!

programme.title: BATTLES
programme.desc: Crystal hunting ROUND 2!

programme.title: Big Mommas: Like Father, Like Son
programme.desc: Big Momma is back — and this time he has big backup: his teenage stepson Trent (Brendan T. Jackson). Martin Lawrence returns as FBI agent Malcolm Turner and as Turner's deep-cover alter-ego Big Momma.

programme.title: Your Sister's Sister
programme.desc: Iris invites her friend Jack to stay at her family's island getaway after the death of his brother. At their remote cabin, Jack's drunken encounter with Hannah, Iris' sister, kicks off a revealing stretch of days.

programme.title: Stealing Sinatra
programme.desc: In 1963, three enterprising, middle-class friends from southern California planned the impossible: the kidnapping of Frank Sinatra, Jr. Minute by minute, misstep by misstep.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: When Steve Dallas hears that his friend Ben Baker has lost his estranged father, the two return to Ben's childhood home to discover Ben has inherited the family fortune.

programme.title: Renegade: The Posse
programme.desc: Reno Raines, a tough, young street cop, is framed for a murder he didn't commit. Fleeing from the only system of justice he knows, Raines takes to the streets as a modern-day bounty hunter.

programme.title: Castle Falls
programme.desc: Castle Heights Hospital, a symbol of the city's segregated past, is ready to be demolished. No one knows that a gang leader, now in prison, hid the 3 million dollars in cash he stole from his rivals inside the abandoned building.

programme.title: Dobermann
programme.desc: A modern cult classic starring Vincent Cassel and Monica Bellucci. A ruthless bank robber must face-off against crooked cop.

programme.title: Daughter of the Wolf
programme.desc: An ex-military specialist comes home when her father passes away. But after getting news that she has inherited a large sum of money, her son is kidnapped. Instead of seeking help, she captures one of the kidnappers, using him to track down her son.

programme.title: Chaos
programme.desc: A brilliant thief has masterminded a series of high-stake bank heists, and for two detectives, the only hope for survival is finding an order to the chaos.

programme.title: The Nora Roberts Collection Season 2
programme.desc: Nate Burns accepts a job as chief of police in Lunacy, Alaska, hoping to to get away from the traumatic death of his partner back in Baltimore. He meets Meg, an independent bush pilot, whose father is found dead in a mountain cave.

programme.title: Hunting Elephants
programme.desc: In Jerusalem, a bullied teen befriends his grandfather and long lost uncle and soon they decide to solve their financial problems by robbing a bank.

programme.title: Exit Speed
programme.desc: Ten bus passengers become stranded inside a scrap yard after being run off the road by bikers. In order to survive they must improvise weapons and have the sheer guts to mount a defense against the murderous bikers.

programme.title: Contract Killers
programme.desc: Double-crossed by those he trusted the most, a newbie government hit man discovers that he's the target for the world's most dangerous assassin and so begins a ruthless game of kill first or be killed.

programme.title: Destined At Christmas
programme.desc: Two people meet on Black Friday, get separated, and yearn to reunite—if only they knew each other's last names and numbers. Can destiny help them find each other by Christmas?

programme.title: Love in Focus
programme.desc: When the hit show actress Jenna Wilde stars in suddenly gets cancelled, the press start circling. To escape the chaos Jenna retreats to a snowy cabin in the mountains. Unexpectedly, she must share this peaceful place with a rude and rugged nature photographer Chris Dixon. Their coolness towards each other starts to thaw when Chris helps Jenna audition for other shows.

programme.title: Love Finds You In Valentine
programme.desc: What can a California girl do with a few dusty acres of land in rural Nebraska? So Kennedy Blaine wonders after she inherits a ranch in the small town of Valentine, Nebraska. As Kennedy makes arrangements to sell the property, she finds herself drawn to the ranch and to its attractive manager, Derek Sterling. She decides to spend the summer in her ancestral home and reconnect with family members. But soon Kennedy is subjected to harassment by someone who clearly wants her to leave Valentine. Depending on God's protection and Derek's assistance, she sets out to discover who is behind the offenses. But when her search reveals painful details about her family and raises questions about Derek's own past, will Kennedy still want to know the truth?

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: They Call Him Cemetery
programme.desc: John and George McIntire are a couple of naive brothers who travel to a lawless western town to see their father.

programme.title: Adventures of Gallant Bess
programme.desc: Ted Daniels, a ranch hand working for a rodeo, captures a magnificent wild horse that he tames and trains. As Ted is recovering from an accident that happened during a rodeo, the rodeo owner cheats him out of his horse.

programme.title: Running Target
programme.desc: In the Colorado Rockies, Sheriff Scott, heads a posse that is after four escaped convicts, and thought it is his sworn duty to return the men dead or alive, he is, as always, reluctant to kill his fellow man.

programme.title: Gunfighters Die Harder
programme.desc: Crooked bankers plan an insurance swindle and hire a Mexican gang to steal the bank's gold but they also pay Lasky's gang to kill the Mexicans.

programme.title: Cattle Queen of Montana
programme.desc: Sierra Nevada Jones must fight a villainous rancher to regain the land that is rightfully hers.

programme.title: Miss Me This Christmas
programme.desc: Regina moves into her friend's suite at The Chesterton Hotel as she waits for her divorce settlement to come through on Christmas Day. While there, she starts a whirlwind romance with a billionaire, who proposes to her.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: Dancing Through Christmas
programme.desc: OLIVIA is picked to run the Christmas recital of The Nutcracker. When a video of Michael practising ballet with Lily goes viral, Olivia sees how much dance really means to the community. Will Olivia be able to save her dance studio with Michael's help?

programme.title: Mythica 2
programme.desc: The second movie in the fantastical Mythica franchise is darker than ever. When a powerful relic is stolen, Marek faces a new sinister enemy set on reclaiming the Darkspore for his master Szorlok. Now Marek and her friends must race through creature-infested lands, to an abandoned underground city, to save themselves from an imminent deadly evil.

programme.title: Tales from the Lodge
programme.desc: Friends gather at a lodge to commemorate a friend, who drowned in a lake nearby 3 years ago. They tell each other scary stories and suddenly find themselves in one.

programme.title: Baghead
programme.desc: Four actors go to a cabin in the woods for the weekend to write a movie script. They talk about a relationship movie or a paper bag over the head movie. It starts with an anonymous baghead and slowly escalates.

programme.title: Little Lord Fauntleroy
programme.desc: An American boy turns out to be the long-lost heir of a British fortune. He is sent to live with the cold and unsentimental lord who oversees the trust.

programme.title: Life With Father
programme.desc: A straitlaced turn-of-the-century father presides over a family of boys and the mother who really rules the roost.

programme.title: Last Time I Saw Paris
programme.desc: An American journalist returns to Paris - a city that gave him true love and deep grief.

programme.title: Kansas City Confidential
programme.desc: An ex-con trying to go straight is framed for a million dollar armored car robbery and must go to Mexico in order to unmask the real culprits.

programme.title: George And The Dragon
programme.desc: A knight (James Purefoy, "Rome") returning from the Crusades takes on a dragon after the disappearance of the kindly Princess Lunna (Piper Perabo, "Coyote Ugly"). With Patrick Swayze.

programme.title: Replicas
programme.desc: A scientist becomes obsessed with bringing back his family members who died in a traffic accident.

programme.title: The Forbidden Kingdom
programme.desc: Two highly skilled martial arts warriors must train an American teen so that he is able to fight a centuries old battle to free the Monkey King.

programme.title: Replicas
programme.desc: A scientist becomes obsessed with bringing back his family members who died in a traffic accident.

programme.title: The Day Time Ended
programme.desc: A futuristic solar home in the far desert was supposed to be their refuge from urban crime. To their horror, the family discovers they're caught in a mind-boggling time warp caused by mysterious aliens with a sinister secret.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Errors of the Human Body
programme.desc: When a potentially lethal virus is created within his new lab, Dr Geoff Burton is shocked to discover he is not only the unwitting cause, but also its first victim.

programme.title: Chariot
programme.desc: In this dark and twisted thriller, John Malkovich stars as Dr. Karn, an odd, eccentric specialist who guides unknowing patients through the reincarnation transition. When Harrison (Thomas Mann) experiences mysterious recurring dreams, he turns to Dr. Karn for help and reveals his encounter with a woman (Rosa Salazar) he loved in a previous life. Noticing a glitch in the system, the doctor must fix the issue before permanently derailing his patient's future.

programme.title: I Think We're Alone Now
programme.desc: Del (Peter Dinklage) is alone in the world. Literally. After the human race is wiped out, he lives in a small, empty town, methodically going from house to house, collecting batteries and other useful items, and burying the dead. He dines alone, reads, watches movies, and shelves books in the local library he's made his home. He's content in his solitude - until he discovers Grace (Elle Fanning), an interloper on his quiet earth. Her history and motives are obscure, and worse yet, she wants to stay.

programme.title: Deck The Heart
programme.desc: When an EVP inherits a manor, he's expected to host his family for Christmas.

programme.title: Against the Wild: Survive the Serengeti
programme.desc: Two kids and their dog must use all their skills to survive in the African bush after a plane crash.

programme.title: Eyewitness
programme.desc: It has been five years after Diana send a man to jail for the murder of her father and fiancee. Then he escapes from prison. He keeps her captive in her own home. Did Diana put an innocent man away?

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Most leave for break, while a few stay behind. Rick is pushed to his breaking point and flips out on Allison.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori throws her five year old son an epic spiderman birthday party!

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is throwing a Christmas party in the middle of summer.

programme.title: Fbi: Negotiator
programme.desc: An FBI agent must negotiate with a woman holding a hospital hostage in order to get her hands on an experimental drug.

programme.title: A Slice of Chicago Romance
programme.desc: In a suburb of Chicago, Romanos & Juliatos, two pizza places, have competed for the town's business for years. When both restaurants get passed down to—RILEY (30s) and SARAH (30s)—after a new pizza chain moves into town, the new bosses struggle to compete after they begin to fall for one another.

programme.title: Swiped
programme.desc: A womanising college student enlists his nerdy roommate to code the ultimate hook up app by offering to pay his tuition for MIT but unexpected consequences ensue.

programme.title: Smart People
programme.desc: A widowed professor (Dennis Quaid) experiences a new love and an unexpected visit from his adopted brother.

programme.title: Tennessee Williams' The Roman Spring of Mrs. Stone
programme.desc: After moving to Rome, a lonely widow finds herself consumed by a destructive love for a young Italian man in this adaptation of Tennessee Williams' haunting novella.

programme.title: Blind
programme.desc: Bestselling novelist, Bill Oakland loses his wife and his sight in a vicious car crash. Five years later Socialite Suzanne Dutchman is forced to read to Bill in an intimate room three times a week as a plea bargain for being associated with her husband's insider trading.

programme.title: Valerian and the City of a Thousand Planets
programme.desc: A dark force threatens Alpha, a vast metropolis and home to species from a thousand planets.

programme.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Thomas unexpectedly inherits a property with a mysterious curse.

programme.title: Fallen
programme.desc: A young girl finds herself in a reform school after therapy since she was blamed for the death of a young boy.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: A businesswoman is pursued by a psychopath after being locked in a parking garage on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: The Curse of Sleeping Beauty
programme.desc: Thomas unexpectedly inherits a property with a mysterious curse.

programme.title: The Magic Reindeer: The Flight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Niko the Reindeer enjoys his cool and carefree life in the Arctic, but that all changes when he is given his most surprising Christmas present ever - a little stepbrother named Jonni! Niko is unhappy about this new addition to the family, but when Jonni is kidnapped by eagles, Niko realises that it's down to him to fly off and rescue his brother!

programme.title: How to Ruin the Holidays
programme.desc: A festive family caper starring Amber Nash (Archer, Mr. Robot) as a struggling comedian who reluctantly returns home for Christmas. Upon her arrival, she must not only deal with her eccentric and wildly dysfunctional family, but ultimately has a life-changing decision to make about her father and special-needs brother.

programme.title: Christmas Couple's Retreat
programme.desc: Three couples attend a retreat to strengthen their respective relationships under the guidance of a famed therapist. But as the holiday season unfolds, unexpected challenges arise when the therapist must confront some feelings of her own, and sparks fly when one couple's son unexpectedly falls for the charming retreat manager. Will this festive getaway reignite these couples' love, or will it lead them down an entirely new path?

programme.title: Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale
programme.desc: Do you believe in Santa Claus? On the eve of Christmas a young boy sets out to discover the truth behind several strange goings on in his small isolated village. Why have all the reindeer been slaughtered? Who took all the hairdryers and radiators? And where have all the children gone? Seal the chimney. Lock the doors. Hide your children. This year the real Santa Claus is coming to town.

programme.title: Tangerine
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in Tinseltown and Sin-Dee (Kitana Kiki Rodriguez) is back on the block. Upon hearing that her pimp boyfriend (James Ransone) hasn't been faithful during the 28 days she was locked up, the working girl and her best friend, Alexandra (Mya Taylor), embark on a mission to get to the bottom of the scandalous rumour. Their rip-roaring odyssey leads them through various subcultures of Los Angeles, including an Armenian family dealing with their own repercussions of infidelity.

programme.title: Reindeer Games Homecoming
programme.desc: MacKenzie competes in "The Reindeer Games" keep her father's tradition alive.

programme.title: Becoming Santa
programme.desc: Holly decides to introduce her boyfriend Connor to her family up north.

programme.title: Four Christmases and a Wedding
programme.desc: Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival.

programme.title: Reindeer Games Homecoming
programme.desc: MacKenzie competes in "The Reindeer Games" keep her father's tradition alive.

programme.title: Plan A
programme.desc: A gripping, high voltage and action-filled thriller based on an incredible true story. In 1945 a group of young Holocaust survivors pledged to avenge the death of their people. Headed by charismatic Abba Kovner (August Diehl: Inglourious Basterds), they devised the biggest plan for Jewish revenge in history: to kill millions of Germans by poisoning their drinking water.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: An explosive, all-out-action cyber-thriller starring action megastar Bruce Willis with Jesse Metcalfe (Escape Plan II) and Chad Michael Murray (Riverdale). Weeks after the deadly assault on Fortress Camp, Robert (Willis) makes a daring rescue to save Sasha, the widow of his old nemesis Balzary (Murray). But back in the camp's command bunker, it appears Sasha may have devious plans of her own.

programme.title: Eden Lodge
programme.desc: A bloodcurdling horror about a married couple that retreat to the idyllic English countryside to fix their marriage. Events rapidly take a turn for the worse when their car breaks down and they are forced to spend the night at a remote B&B. The place looks like a paradise, until they realise that the people they meet are being killed off one by one. A spine-tingling living nightmare.

programme.title: Pledge
programme.desc: Spiked with twisted humour and gruesome shocks. When invited to join an elite fraternity, three freshmen social misfits want to improve their reputations. Soon, they are unexpectedly recruited by a shadowy social club offering them raging parties and VIP social status. The catch? A sadistic initiation ritual that goes from depraved to deadly over the course of 48 booze and blood-soaked hours.

programme.title: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: When identical twin sisters are stuck planning their respective Christmas parties, they're convinced the grass is greener on the other side and decide to swap lives for the holidays.

programme.title: Road to Christmas
programme.desc: A TV producer is producing a Christmas Special for the 5th year but she is then told to co-produce it with the host's son.

programme.title: A Date By Christmas
programme.desc: After her brilliant idea for a new dating app is stolen by a workplace rival, Chelsea's fortunes take a turn for the better following a Christmas wish upon a shooting star.

programme.title: Love On Ice
programme.desc: A new coach comes to town and offers a former figure skating champion the opportunity to revive her career and compete for glory. Together, they realise that love can thrive beyond the ice. (2017)

programme.title: Love, Alaska
programme.desc: Loner Finn has been home for a year but doesn't feel like he fits in. All is about to change when old flame Maggie returns home. (2019)

programme.title: 40 Below And Falling
programme.desc: Kate is desperate to get to her wedding, but due to a snowstorm, she is stuck. Will the mysterious mountain man help her get to the church on time or will calamity come Kates why? (2015)

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A recently dumped travel writer goes on a ski getaway with her best friend and they find themselves double booked with two eligible men. When they are snowed in, love ensues, as it always does. (2018)

programme.title: Champagne Charlie
programme.desc: To the boisterous, gaslit London of the 1860's came Joe Sanders and his brother Fred to seek their fortunes. They came from Leybourne in Yorkshire, where Fred was a local prizefighter.

programme.title: EVERGREEN
programme.desc: Jessie Matthews plays two roles in this Rodgers and Hart musical comedy.

programme.title: LONDON TOWN
programme.desc: Jerry, a comedian, has been promised a part in a London show, so he packs up and moves there with his daughter.

programme.title: DAYBREAK
programme.desc: Eddie is a man with a secret - his second job is that of public hangman. When he falls into the canal following a fight with a youth over his wife, his body is not found. A thriller with unexpected twists.

programme.title: NEUTRAL PORT
programme.desc: When a German U-boat sinks Captain Ferguson's ship he vows revenge. The intelligence officers wish to follow the U-boat. Captain Ferguson disobeys these orders and breaks navy policy. How will he achieve his mission with his reputation still intact?

programme.title: Saving Christmas
programme.desc: In this clever, crazy family adventure starring comedy legend Edward Asner, Danny and his brainy buddies launch an "X-Files"-style investigation to discover the truth about Santa. But they have no clue that St. Nick (Asner) is real—and he's making toys right in their hometown!

programme.title: The Devil's Own
programme.desc: The strength of a young Irishman's convictions brings him into conflict with his unsuspecting host and draws them both into danger.

programme.title: Assault on VA-33
programme.desc: Decorated veteran and PTSD sufferer, Jason Hill (Flanery) meets his wife, Jennifer, for lunch at the Veteran's Affairs hospital where she works.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Two Los Angeles homicide detectives are dispatched to a northern town where the sun doesn't set to investigate the methodical murder of a local teen.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In the year 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, who live on a pristine man-made space station called Elysium, and the rest, who live on an overpopulated, ruined Earth.

programme.title: U-Turn
programme.desc: A small-time gambler gets more than he bargained for when his car breaks down near a remote desert town.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.desc: Just when you thought it was safe, the deadliest reptiles are back. The fourth installment in the Anaconda series.

programme.title: Anacondas
programme.sub-title: The Hunt For The Blood Orchid
programme.desc: When a corporate pharmaceutical sponsor is about to pull the plug on research, part-time adventurer Dr. Jack Byron re-awakens their interest with tales of the Borneo black orchid, said to produce a chemical that can keep a cell reproducing indefinitely. When the trip becomes increasingly dangerous, due to floods, capsized boats and gigantic, ill-tempered anacondas, Byron refuses to allow his crew to end the expedition, and resorts to foul play in order to keep them on the trail.

programme.title: Fools Rush In (1997)
programme.desc: Worlds collide when pragmatic New Yorker and fiery Latina impulsively marry.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Joe Dirt 2: Beautiful Loser
programme.desc: Joe Dirt travels back in time and becomes rich because he knows the future.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: The Magic of Belle Isle
programme.desc: An alcoholic novelist (Morgan Freeman) rediscovers his passion for writing, and for life, when he begrudgingly befriends a single mother.

programme.title: The Fifth Estate
programme.desc: Driven to expose corporate crimes and government secrets no matter what the cost, an activist and computer hacker team up to become the underground watchdogs of the privileged and powerful.

programme.title: Anesthesia
programme.desc: Multiple lives intersect in the aftermath of the violent mugging of a Columbia University philosophy professor.

programme.title: The Champion of Auschwitz
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the Polish pre-war boxing champion Tadeusz "Teddy" Pietrzykowski, who, early in the Second World War, arrived with the very first transport of prisoners to the newly created Auschwitz-Birkenau concentration camp, where he became known as 'The Champion of Auschwitz'.

programme.title: The Legend Of Hercules
programme.desc: In the epic origin story the legend of Hercules, a half-god, half-man blessed with extraordinary streng. Betrayed by his stepfather, the king, and exiled and sold into slavery because of a forbidden love, Hercules must use his formidable powers.

programme.title: Savage Justice
programme.desc: Newly engaged Shelby John (Jack Huston) and Ruby Red want a fresh start after their struggles with addiction, but when Shelby discovers his beloved Ruby dead on their porch, he embarks on a vengeful killing spree of the dealers who supplied her.

programme.title: Redemption Day
programme.desc: US. Marine Captain Brad Paxton is on a rescue mission to save his wife, kidnapped by a terrorist group leader.

programme.title: Big Ass Spider!
programme.desc: A giant alien spider escapes from a military lab and rampages the city of Los Angeles. When a massive military strike fails, it is up to a team of scientists and one clever exterminator to kill the creature before the city is destroyed.

programme.desc: Jamai Raja is an Indian drama series about Siddharth, who marries Roshni to mend her strained relationship with her mother, Durga Devi Patel. The show explores the complexities of family dynamics, love, and duty as Siddharth navigates various challenges to unite his new family.

programme.title: Second Chances

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.title: The Good Son
programme.desc: Raja Beta is an Indian television drama series that revolves around the life of Vedant Tripathi, an ideal and dutiful son. Vedant is adopted by the Tripathi family and grows up to become a successful gynecologist. Despite facing challenges and prejudice due to his adopted status, he wins the love and respect of his family through his unwavering dedication, kindness, and sense of responsibility.

programme.title: Tales of the Cold War
programme.desc: Some just counted tanks, others stole blueprints for nuclear bombs. During the Cold War, Germany was the battleground for thousands of spies and spotters. The threat of nuclear overkill provoked a near insatiable hunger for intelligence on both sides of the Iron Curtain.

programme.title: Mission behind the Iron Curtain
programme.desc: During the Cold War, tensions between East and West mount alarmingly. In consequence, western intelligence services shift their focus on East Germany as the Warsaw Pact's major deployment zone. Among those send forth are so-called travel spies, basically amateurs, as well as the professionals with the military missions.

programme.title: War in the Shadows
programme.desc: At the outset of the 80s, the Soviet army is universally modernized. The renovation of its armored divisions is well underway, observed closely by western military intelligence in East Germany. At center stage: their T 80 tanks and Mil Mi-28 combat helicopters. Weapons-scouts in the field are not the only ones constantly on active duty at that time, however.

programme.title: Mata Hari
programme.desc: In February 1917 World War I is raging when Mata Hari is arrested in Paris and taken to the examining magistrate. Her very life is at stake: she is accused of high treason. The famous exotic dancer has come to represent beauty and the power of feminine seduction. The documentary Mata Hari - the Beautiful Spy tracks down the true story of this fascinating woman.

programme.title: Stalin's Daughter
programme.desc: It is a sensation in the midst of the Cold War. Stalin's daughter Svetlana Alliluyeva flees to the West. During her childhood in the center of power, she was Joseph Stalin's favorite child. But death and violence overshadow her life. Her mother and brother die, relatives are killed, Stalin has her lover abducted.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Pirates
programme.desc: In November 1916, German raider SMS Wolf set out for a 15-month long voyage through the oceans finally reaching Australia and Papua New Guinea. The mission of this ship which was perfectly masked as a merchant vessel: capture, sink or destroy allied shipping.

programme.title: Nutcracker: Backstage With English National Ballet
programme.desc: Behind the curtain with English National Ballet and their world premiere of a brand-new production of `Nutcracker'.

programme.title: Portugals Mountains Of Wonder
programme.desc: In Trás-os-Montes, the most remote of Portugal's provinces, lying at the northeastern corner of the country, there lie two relatively small mountains that keep nonetheless a vast and rich natural heritage. Local and prominent writer Miguel Torga nicknamed the region “The Wonderfull Kingdom” due to its wonders of wildlife and natural sceneries.

programme.title: Slow Down and Enjoy Life
programme.desc: The natural world often moves so fast that we don't even see it, but slow it down the action and a whole new world is revealed.

programme.title: Wild Christmas
programme.desc: Donkeys, reindeer, robins: Christmas tradition, symbolism and history are full of characters from the natural world.

programme.title: Coasts
programme.desc: To us the beach is one giant playground, but for wildlife it's a place to live, to find food and to raise their young. Amongst the fish and chips, sandcastles and donkey rides it's easy to forget that beaches are vital habitats, home to a myriad of animals.

programme.title: Giants of Europe
programme.desc: Once upon a time, huge beasts roamed Europe. But these magnificent creatures were driven out by our greed, and we are only now starting to realise how poor our landscapes are without them. Mercifully, this realisation has started to fuel an exciting change of fortunes for Europe's wildlife.

programme.title: Lion
programme.desc: The endless plains of East Africa is a paradise for lions. The most social of all cats, lions form prides that are unlike any other animals. Together, they'll hunt, raise their young and defend their territory. With such a close family and plentiful home, the pride welcomes new babies every year. But new children introduces new dangers. The cubs will have to trust their instincts, their mother and the power of the pride if they are to make it to adulthood and take their place on the African plains.

programme.title: Portugals Mountains Of Wonder
programme.desc: In Trás-os-Montes, the most remote of Portugal's provinces, lying at the northeastern corner of the country, there lie two relatively small mountains that keep nonetheless a vast and rich natural heritage. Local and prominent writer Miguel Torga nicknamed the region “The Wonderfull Kingdom” due to its wonders of wildlife and natural sceneries.

programme.title: Wild Faces of Switzerland
programme.desc: In the heart of Europe lies Switzerland. It's a surprisingly big little country: small in area, but big on natural beauty. And, like its many languages and cultures, its scenic diversity is something really special, too: from mighty Alps, dense forests and lush green valleys, to mysterious moors and roaring waterfalls. Mediterranean lakes and craggy rock landscapes are all close together in one small geographical location. Switzerland has many wild faces – some familiar and some hidden. It's a country that's astonishingly rich in variety, wilderness and scenic wonder. Each episode of the series seeks to do justice to this diversity.

programme.title: Project Antarctica
programme.desc: Why don't you do something sensible? - Tim, Michael and Dennis have heard this sentence more than once since their school days when they professed their dream jobs: Artist, photographer, filmmaker. And they went on to say that some dreams had to remain dreams, that work didn't have to be fun, but above all that it had to pay enough and be safe. A few years later, the three are working on their joint feature film. They put all their eggs in one basket and are determined to invest two years of working time to achieve their goal. Unpaid. It's not just any goal: the three want to travel to Antarctica. They want to find out whether it is possible to reach even the most distant destinations if you only want to. With ten boxes full of equipment, they set off on the 14,000 km journey to Antarctica. And thus on the journey of a lifetime...

programme.title: Alpine Lakes
programme.desc: This is a nature documentary, which leads us into the fascinating world of deep mountain lakes. We conquer ice palaces of unsuspected beauty. In the freezers, in which elves, fairies and mountain trolls once did their mischief, we move, using a special breathing technique and with special cameras in search of nocturnal hunters, whose eyes are equipped with residual light amplifying receptors.

programme.title: Rewilding: Back to Nature
programme.desc: Worldwide, there are various projects and approaches to give nature more space again. The aim is to create larger wilderness areas that develop with hardly any influence of humans - by reintroducing so-called key animal species and creating a network of wilderness corridors across entire continents. Rewilding promises to be a cost-effective form of conservation in which we can boost biodiversity and protect the climate.

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.desc: While the Tolga Bat Hospital is looking after endangered flying foxes, researchers are using thermographic cameras to search for flying foxes and koalas. But they can also detect bush and wildfire more quickly. (S1 E01)

programme.title: Wildlife Diaries Australia
programme.desc: The Cairns Turtle Rehabilitation Center (CTRC) raises and cares for sick, or injured turtles, while the Schmidt Ocean Institute goes on a diving mission with a high-tech underwater rover. In this way, we learn firsthand about the state of Australia's sensitive marine animals' natural habitat and what needs to be done to ensure their survival. (S1 E02)

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There are senses we share with most animals, but what about those senses that human is equipped with? Infrared light, electromagnetic waves and ultrasound, are all found within a spectrum of sensory information that just passes by ordinary humans.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: There's a whole world and more than one spectrum of sensations that animals are aware of, yet which just pass humans by. There's a kind of “sixth sense” that some animals have which still defies explanation.

programme.title: Super Senses
programme.desc: In this episode, we examine how every animal has what could be called a sense of rhythm – the human animal included. To give an obvious example, there's our internal body clock which responds to the so-called Circadian rhythm.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Were in sunny Finland for the next stage of a double-bill of SCL action, but this time its a team event. A truly fantastic event with 6000 spectators. Even during COVID times this was exceptional! 8 Strong Teams where fighting for the title over a crazy 9 events. (S7 E06)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland, done over 9 cruel events. In this episode the last and final 5 events take place. 8 Strong Teams are fighting for the title. (S7 E07)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next set of challenges are set in sunny Esposende in Portugal. With stars such as Travis Ortmayer, Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland, and Ervin Toots from Estonia. While Fabio Silva will defend the honour in his own country. (S7 E08)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back in Germany, with the world record breakers. We promise you this is going to be amazing. Do not move from that seat, because we are going to see some records smashed today. Over 6 cruel events, you will see who gets crowned of the King Of The Castle! (S7 E09)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: With the next episode of Strongman Champions League Germany. Its the world record breakers, and in the last show we set two new records. Can more be records be broken before the king of the castle is crowned? (S7 E10)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated? (S7 E11)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion? (S7 E12)

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title. (S7 E13)
